75 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

77 void
78 ContactGroup::
79 setItems(const Int32ConstArrayView & lids)
80 {
81  if (m_impl)
82  return m_impl->setItems(lids);
83  else
84  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Cannot set contacts on a null group");
85 }

91 addItems(const Int32ConstArrayView & lids)

95  else
96  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Cannot set contacts on a null group");
